_note: NOT from 13F. Manually maintained. Sources: Berkshire 10-Q consolidated balance sheet (cash / U.S. Treasury Bills / fixed-maturity bonds) and Japanese large-shareholding reports + Buffett's annual letter (the 5 trading houses). These figures do NOT feed the 13F weight/diff logic. Update by hand when new filings appear; see README. Roadmap: automate via 10-Q XBRL and EDINET.
